title: Scaffold a dark software factory control plane
problem: Create the first executable spine for a system that can plan, execute, review, repair, and prepare releases after intent confirmation.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The repo has a domain-first monorepo scaffold with package boundaries for intent, planning, execution, review, policy, artifacts, repo, and Dogpile coordination.
A CLI composition path can construct a confirmed intent, run manifest, plan graph, execution plan, and review gate.

toolPermissions.reason: Coordinate planning and review piles over bounded factory artifacts.

constraints: Dogpile is a coordination cell, not the factory authority boundary.
